author: Panagiotis Koletsos
description: Display wide tables, diagrams, images, and code blocks in scrollable wide frames while preserving normal readable prose width. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Panagiotis Koletsos
manifest.description: Display wide tables, diagrams, images, and code blocks in scrollable wide frames while keeping normal note text readable.
manifest.name: Dynamic Wide Content

name: Dynamic Wide Content

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Addresses community review findings: CSS now lives in styles.css, settings apply through body classes and CSS variables, popout compatibility uses activeDocument, deprecated settings APIs are removed, and the release includes a lockfile and contributing guide.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Addresses community review findings: CSS now lives in styles.css, settings apply through body classes and CSS variables, popout compatibility uses activeDocument, deprecated settings APIs are removed, and the release includes a lockfile and contributing guide.

releases.author: pcoletsos
releases.description: Initial beta release of Dynamic Wide Content.\n\nWide tables, diagrams, images, and code blocks can use scrollable wide frames while normal prose remains in the readable note column.
